name: New Player Signing
description: Official announcement of a new player signing. High-impact reveal designed for maximum social engagement with player details and welcome messaging.

subheadline.example: The Croatian international joins on a four-year contract

guidelines: Use a cinematic reveal video with the player in the new Demo Brand kit. Include dramatic lighting effects and the club anthem. The shirt number should animate in. For Reels/TikTok, use a trending reveal transition. Include the player holding up the shirt or signing the contract. Hashtag #WelcomeToMaximir.
